top3.sql:
WITH order_lines AS (
    SELECT 
        ol.id AS orderline_id,
        ol.order_id,
        ol.product_id,
        ol.qty AS ordered_qty,
        SUM(ol.qty) OVER (PARTITION BY ol.order_id, ol.product_id ORDER BY ol.id) AS cumulative_qty
    FROM orderlines ol
    WHERE ol.order_id = 423
),
available_inventory AS (
    SELECT 
        i.id AS inventory_id,
        i.location_id,
        l.aisle,
        l.position,
        i.product_id,
        i.qty AS available_qty,
        p.purchased,
    ...

WITH RECURSIVE 
order_products AS (
    SELECT 
        ol.order_id, 
        ol.product_id, 
        ol.qty AS ordered_qty,
        SUM(ol.qty) OVER (PARTITION BY ol.order_id, ol.product_id ORDER BY ol.id) AS cum_ordered_qty

    WHERE ol.order_id = 423
),
available_inventory AS (
    SELECT 
        i.product_id, 
        i.location_id, 
        i.qty AS available_qty,
        p.purchased,
        SUM(i.qty) OVER (PARTITION BY i.product_id ORDER BY p.purchased, i.qty) AS ...
